title: Bombay High Court urges Aditya Dhar, Santosh Kumar to resolve Dhurandhar 2 script row
description: The Bombay High Court on Thursday indicated that the defamation case filed by writer-director of "Dhurandhar 2 – The Revenge" Aditya Dhar against writer‑filmmaker Santosh Kumar over the origins of the film's script should not be allowed to spiral [Aditya Dhar v. Santosh Kumar RS & Ors]Justice Arif Doctor today urged both sides to resolve the issue.“A matter like this should be resolved. It doesn’t need to escalate into a fight for defamation,” Justice Doctor observed. Dhar has sued Kumar ove
